articles.title: Trump and the Moon Mission: A Big Space Adventure
articles.summary: President Trump is excited about a NASA mission to the Moon called Artemis. This mission will send four astronauts to the Moon, which is a big deal because it's the first deep space trip since 1972. Trump thinks it can help bring Americans together during a time when the country is divided on issues like immigration and the economy. The mission is also a step toward building a base on the Moon and going to Mars someday. Trump started this plan during his first term and now wants to return to the Moon by 2028. China is also trying to go to the Moon, so the US wants to stay ahead. Long ago, the US raced the Soviet Union to the Moon to show they were the best in space. Now, it's like a new race with China, and it could lead to finding valuable resources on the Moon.

articles.title: Planting Trees to Help Nature on an Island
articles.summary: On the Isle of Man, a group called the Manx Wildlife Trust has planted 30,000 trees to create a special forest called a temperate rainforest. This forest is good for animals, plants, and people. Volunteers helped plant the trees at a place called Creg y Cowin, and they finished two years early. The trees will make the air and water cleaner, help stop floods, and make people feel happy and healthy. In the future, cows and sheep might live in the forest to help it grow naturally. The project is part of a bigger plan to plant more trees across the island and other places. It is paid for by a company called Aviva. The trees will take many years to grow big, but they will make the island a better home for everyone.

articles.title: Astronauts Going to the Moon: Their Special Items
articles.summary: Four astronauts are going on a big trip to orbit the Moon. They are Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen. This is the first time people will go around the Moon in over 50 years. They are all pilots, engineers, and scientists. They also have families and talk about the risks of space travel. Reid Wiseman is the commander and will take a small notepad to write his thoughts. Christina Koch will be the first woman to travel to the Moon. The astronauts are excited and hope this mission helps people live on the Moon someday. They are brave and work together as a team.

articles.title: Knee Pain Relief: Simple Ways to Feel Better
articles.summary: A big study found that simple things like knee braces, water therapy, and exercise are the best ways to help with knee arthritis pain without using medicine. Knee arthritis makes knees hurt and stiff, and it affects many older people. Medicines can have bad side effects, so doctors looked at other ways. They studied 139 trials with almost 10,000 people and compared 12 treatments. Knee braces were the best at reducing pain and helping knees move better. Water therapy, which is doing exercises in warm water, was great for pain relief. Exercise also helped a lot. Some fancy treatments like laser therapy worked a little, but ultrasound didn't help much. The study says these simple options are safer than drugs and should be tried first.

articles.title: A Strange Space Explosion Seen by a Big Telescope
articles.summary: Scientists using the James Webb Space Telescope saw a mysterious explosion in space that lasted much longer than usual. This explosion, called GRB 250702B, is a type of event that happens when a big star collapses into a black hole, but this one lasted for hours instead of seconds. Astronomers like Huei Sears from Rutgers are studying it because it behaves differently, with X-ray activity seen a day before. Many telescopes around the world, including ones from NASA and China, helped watch it. They think it might involve a black hole merging with a star or something else unusual. The explosion happened in a galaxy far away, about 8 billion light-years from Earth, which means it occurred long ago. Scientists are still trying to figure out what caused this strange event.

articles.title: The Mystery of Amelia Earhart's Disappearance
articles.summary: Amelia Earhart was a famous pilot who tried to fly around the world in 1937 but disappeared over the ocean. People have many ideas about what happened to her, like crashing into the sea or landing on an island. A new book by Rachel Hartigan looks at these ideas and tells about Earhart's life. Hartigan went on a trip to an island to search for clues but did not find proof. She thinks the most likely story is that Earhart got lost and ran out of gas. The book helps us understand why people are still curious about this mystery today.
